servinfo.title: Front and Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Wheel Speed Sensor Removal and Installation
Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Front Wheel Speed Sensor
servinfosub.ptxt: Replace or clean the front wheel speed sensor if sensing area of front wheel speed sensor is damaged or covered with iron powder.

servinfosub.title: Rear Wheel Speed Sensor

attention3.ptxt: Rear wheel speed sensor is included in rear wheel hub assembly. Replace rear wheel hub assembly, if rear wheel speed sensor is defective.

servinfosub.ptxt: Check rear wheel speed sensor, referring to Front and Rear Wheel Speed Sensor On-Vehicle Inspection .
